payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown carved wooden dining chair with ornate turned legs and a dark upholstered seat cushion; glossy finish and some visible scuffing on the lower stretcher, appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark carved wooden chair edge","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown carved wooden dining chair with ornate turned legs and a dark upholstered seat cushion; glossy finish and some visible scuffing on the lower stretcher, appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).","attributes":["dark reddish-brown finish","carved wood","ornate turned legs","dark upholstered seat","glossy surface","visible scuffs","edge-cropped / partial"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
